positive: A sophisticated, stylized illustration of a forest gnome and a wise, celestial owl perched on a mushroom cap. The style should be neo-traditional whimsical tattoo art mixed with Art Nouveau flow. Focus on clean silhouettes and deep, emerald green and gold color palette, accented by touches of ethereal sapphire blue. The composition must be centrally focused and symmetrical, perfect for a chest print on a jacket. Include detailed flora elements like glowing moss and curled vines, and a strong contrast between the illuminated subjects and a deep, magical forest backdrop. Vector-art precision, clean line work, high contrast.
negative: blur, artifacts, text, watermark, extra limbs, bad anatomy, noise, low detail, photorealism, grunge, dirty, oversaturated, signature, logo, trademark
